ai.article_illustration_hint: Article illustrations will be inserted into the body after confirmation and recorded in the visual asset metadata.

cover_generator.confirm_candidate_notice: The current editor only generates candidate images by default. They will be written back to the cover or inserted into the body only after confirmation.
cover_generator.magic_hint: Automatically generate five-dimensional prompt suggestions based on the article content

placeholders.palette: Primary colors, accents, and lightness direction
placeholders.text: Title, weight, whitespace, and copy treatment

cover_generator.polling: Rendering round {step} (please keep this panel open)...
cover_generator.success: Visual assets generated and saved to the media library
cover_generator.title: AI Visual Asset Generator
cover_generator.usage_hint: Post covers, article illustrations, topic hero images, and event posters all use the same five-dimensional prompt model.

ai.visual_asset_inserted: The visual asset has been inserted into the body and recorded in the metadata.
ai.voice_unsupported: Speech recognition is not supported in this browser. Please try Chrome or Edge.

posts.clear_tags_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to clear all tags from this post? This action is not saved automatically.
posts.content_too_short: The post content is too short to analyze
posts.copyright_hint: Leave blank to use the global default notice

distribution.extension_missing: WechatSync extension not detected. Please install it and sign in first.
distribution.first_sync_hint: The first delivery will create new remote content.

precheck.blocking_toast: The selected WechatSync accounts still have unresolved compatibility issues. Adjust the content or deselect those accounts first.
precheck.xiaohongshu_adjusted_detail: Detected heading anchors, notice blocks, code-group wrappers, or copy buttons. These structures rely more on extension-side compatibility handling on the Xiaohongshu path; the current experiment will still send the raw/default payload, so watch these accounts closely during joint validation. Accounts: {accounts}
precheck.xiaohongshu_blocking_detail: The current content still contains structures that are high-risk for the Xiaohongshu editor: {components}. The current experiment will still send the raw/default payload, but these accounts are more likely to fail in the extension path. Watch the joint-validation result closely or temporarily deselect these accounts. Accounts: {accounts}
precheck.xiaohongshu_blocking_title: Xiaohongshu accounts have high-risk compatibility issues
precheck.weibo_adjusted_detail: Detected blockquotes, code styling, heading anchors, or image containers. These structures rely more on extension-side compatibility handling on the Weibo path; the current experiment will still send the raw/default payload, so watch these accounts closely during joint validation. Accounts: {accounts}
precheck.weibo_blocking_detail: The current content still contains structures that are high-risk for Weibo: {components}. The current experiment will still send the raw/default payload, but these accounts are more likely to fail in the extension path. Watch the joint-validation result closely or temporarily deselect these accounts. Accounts: {accounts}
precheck.weibo_blocking_title: Weibo accounts have high-risk compatibility issues

preview.no_account_selected: Select WechatSync accounts to inspect the exact payload each platform will receive before syncing.
preview.title: Pre-sync content check

distribution.wechatsync_ready: WechatSync extension detected. Select accounts to start delivery.
distribution.wechatsync_timeout: WechatSync timed out while waiting for the extension to report a complete status. Incomplete accounts were marked as failed.

floating_actions.leave_confirm: You have unsaved changes on this page. Are you sure you want to leave?

posts.image_upload_success: Image uploaded and inserted into the content
posts.parse_failed: Failed to parse the Markdown file
posts.pinned_hint: You can pin up to 3 posts. All pinned posts are shown first in the public post list, while the homepage latest section keeps only the most recent pinned post and fills the remaining slots with the newest posts.
posts.publish_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to publish this post? Visitors will be able to view it after publishing.
posts.push_criteria_hint: The system will automatically match users who subscribe to this post's category or tags.

push_options.draft_desc: Automatically create a marketing push draft so you can review and send it later in the Marketing Center.
push_options.none_desc: Only publish the post without notifying subscribers.
push_options.now_desc: Send an email notification to matching subscribers immediately after the post is published.

posts.recover_draft_confirm: An unsaved local draft was found. Restore it?
posts.repush_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to send this post to subscribers again? A new email notification will be created.
posts.save_current_first: Please save the current post before creating a translated version

setup_reminder.description: If AI, notification, or storage settings are not ready yet, you can quickly review the settings panel first. If you'd rather not be interrupted, you can also start creating right away.
setup_reminder.title: One Last Reminder Before You Start

posts.slug_hint: Custom URL path for this post
posts.sync_to_memos_desc: After the post is published, automatically create a summary note in your Memos instance.
posts.tags_hint: Type a tag name and press Enter
posts.title: Post Management
posts.translate_success: Translation completed and applied to the content area.
posts.translation_group_hint: Link different language versions of the same post to enable frontend language switching.

action_descriptions.continue: Translation will continue from the current draft, and the selected fields will be updated with new results.
action_descriptions.create: A new translation will be created in the target language, and only the fields selected this time will be written.
action_descriptions.overwrite: The selected fields in the current published version will be retranslated and overwritten. Proceed with caution.

translation_workflow.continue_draft: The current target draft already contains content. If you continue, the selected fields will be updated with new translation results.
translation_workflow.intro: Select a source version, the target language, and the fields to overwrite. The system will automatically switch between streaming apply and chunked apply based on text length while preserving already written content boundaries.
translation_workflow.no_sources: No source posts are available right now. Save the source post first or load another version from the same translation cluster.
translation_workflow.overwrite_draft: The current target version already contains content. If you continue, the selected fields will be overwritten with new translation results.
translation_workflow.overwrite_published_first: The current target version has already been published. Continuing will overwrite the corresponding fields in the live version. Please confirm before proceeding.
translation_workflow.overwrite_published_second: This is the second confirmation. If you continue, the selected fields in the published version will be replaced with new translation results.
translation_workflow.same_language_warning: The source language and target language cannot be the same. Please choose again.
translation_workflow.scope_hint: Categories and tags will first try to match target-language entities in the same translation cluster. Cover images and podcast audio will be synced directly from the source attachments.
translation_workflow.stream_fallback: Streaming apply failed. Switched to chunked apply automatically.
translation_workflow.switch_target_hint: The current editor is not the target language version. After you start, it will switch to the corresponding target-language editor and keep your source and scope selections.
translation_workflow.task_fallback: The current deployment environment does not support long-text streaming translation. Switched to task polling automatically.
translation_workflow.title: Full Translation Workflow

tts.attach_success: Audio linked to the post successfully
tts.manuscript_hint: You can fine-tune the script or click AI Optimize to generate a more engaging broadcast version.
tts.podcast_manuscript_notice: In dual-host podcast mode, the Doubao model will rewrite the copy again during synthesis, so the final audio may not exactly match the current script.

posts.version_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this version record?
posts.version_diff_empty: No field changes in this comparison
posts.version_restore_failed: Failed to restore the historical version
posts.version_restore_noop: The target version is already the latest state, so no duplicate version record was created.
posts.version_restore_success: The version has been restored and a new linear version record has been created.
posts.version_rollback_confirm: Are you sure you want to roll back to this version? The current editor content will be overwritten and take effect after saving.
posts.version_rollback_success: This version has been loaded into the editor
posts.visibility_hint: Set the access level for this post

wechatsync.extension_help: Please install and enable the WechatSync (Article Sync Assistant) browser extension to use this feature.
wechatsync.no_accounts: No available accounts found. Make sure you are signed in through the extension.
